<!-- Thanks for contributing to Zahran POS! Please fill in the sections below. -->

## Summary
<!-- One short paragraph describing *what* changed and *why*. -->

## Change type
- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] perf
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore / infra / CI
- [ ] breaking change

## Affected area
- [ ] backend
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] database / migrations
- [ ] docs
- [ ] CI / deployment

## Test plan
<!-- How did you verify this works? Paste commands + results. -->
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes (frontend)
- [ ] `npm test` passes (backend + frontend)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (both)
- [ ] Manual smoke test of the affected page / endpoint
- [ ] Database migration applies cleanly on a fresh DB

## Screenshots / recordings
<!-- For UI changes, drop a screenshot or short screen recording. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I added / updated tests where useful
- [ ] I updated docs (README / migration notes / Swagger) if behavior changed
- [ ] I verified RTL layout and Arabic copy for any UI changes
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal data committed
